title: cudrania fruticosa
intro: Cudrania fruticosa, also known as the Chinese jujube or Korean jujube, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, characterized by its small, yellow or red fruits and a unique, woody texture. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which contribute to its ability to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cudrania fruticosa include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Cudrania fruticosa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
